◎简　　介  

　　Destroyed homes, threats at gunpoint and high-court action, this battle by three young people to stand up for their rights is a testimony to people's power. When the South African government promises to 'eradicate the slums' and begins to evict shack dwellers far outside the city, three friends who live in Durban's vast shantytowns refuse to be moved. Dear Mandela follows their...
